mission.title: argo-rollouts: Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query
mission.description: Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query. This issue affects 21+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo-rollouts troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo-rollouts deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `received non 2xx response code: 400 {\"errors\":[\"Functions are not supported in metrics data source field. Use the for`

steps.title: Review argo-rollouts configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts
```
Checklist:

Using formulas in AnalysisTemplate with Datadog v2 API fails with API error 

```received non 2xx response code: 400 {"errors":["Functions are not supported in metrics data source field.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query
steps.description:
Add support for Datadog v2 api. 
Add new properties `queries` and `formula`.
Update the docs with some more examples, more details around v2.

Update CRDs to express validation requirements, allowing us to remove some guardrails in the code. 

Rationale:
given the validation at the heart of k8s objects is held to a high standard
given the context the analysis Runs exec is k8s
given the the Analysis Template has a defined spec

eg: we can then make some assumptions
apiVersion _is_ empty, v1, v2

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Datadog v2 API fails when using formulas in query is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts -n argo-rollouts --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `received non 2xx response code: 400 {\"errors\":[\"Functions are not supported in metrics data source field. Use the for` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
Add support for Datadog v2 api. 
Add new properties `queries` and `formula`.
Update the docs with some more examples, more details around v2.

Update CRDs to express validation requirements, allowing us to remove some guardrails in the code.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible.
